# registerGetCoffeesModule()

```ts
function registerGetCoffeesModule(server: McpServer, repo: CoffeeRepository): void;
```

Defined in: [coffee/get-coffees/module/get-coffees.module.ts:19](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/62c5385e7834255cbc79054e76ff8b2672403290/src/app/coffee/get-coffees/module/get-coffees.module.ts#L19)

Wires the get-coffees module-service chain and registers the MCP tool.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                                                        | Description                             |
| --------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | `McpServer`                                                                                                 | The MCP server to register the tool on. |
| `repo`    | [`CoffeeRepository`](../../../../shared/repository/coffee/coffee.repository/interfaces/CoffeeRepository.md) | The coffee repository for data access.  |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Creates the service and controller instances with dependency injection,
then delegates tool registration to [registerGetCoffeesTool](../../../tool/get-coffees.tool/functions/registerGetCoffeesTool.md).
Wiring order: repository → [GetCoffeesService](../../../service/get-coffees.service/classes/GetCoffeesService.md) →
[GetCoffeesController](../../../controller/get-coffees.controller/classes/GetCoffeesController.md) → tool.
